name: coLssConfigNodeId
title: coLssConfigNodeId
syntax: void coLssConfigNodeId( dword nodeId, dword errCode[] );
description: With this service, the LSS master configures the node-ID of a LSS slave. Only one LSS slave may be in configuration mode.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: Node-ID that should be given to the LSS slave, value range 1..127
